description: reindex fill_value=0 fills missing indices with 0 instead of NaN

_meta.explanation: fill_value=0 replaces the default NaN for missing index positions. Note: with fill_value=NaN, the int Series upcasts to float64 to hold NaN. With fill_value=0, the int dtype is preserved.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 1. Also illustrates the int→float upcast that fill_value=NaN triggers.
_meta.generation_recipe: pandas_mc injection: reindex fill_value=0 fills missing indices with 0 instead of NaN
